name: Permit.io
description: Permit.io authorization-as-a-service for fine-grained access control

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Permit.io
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Create or copy your API key
4. Paste it below

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Permit.io authorization platform is accessible

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Permit.io organizations to verify access control is active
